title: ilyogeton subulatum
intro: Ilyogeton subulatum, also known as desert-holly, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Apiaceae family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ilyogeton subulatum include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Ilyogeton subulatum include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
